headline: KMS Technology Appoints Jason Wojahn as CEO to Lead the Shift to AI-Native Enterprise Execution
summary: ATLANTA, May 11, 2026--KMS Technology, a leading U.S. based Digital Engineering, Data, and AI company, today announced the appointment of Jason Wojahn as Chief Executive Officer.
